civic_duty.agreeable: Should the country expand voluntary national service with strong education and job benefits, prioritizing high-need roles?
civic_duty.controversial: Should the country require 12 months of national service for 18–25-year-olds—with no corporate exemptions—and penalize employers who discourage participation?

privacy.agreeable: Should police use facial recognition only with a warrant, narrow case scopes, and short data retention?
privacy.controversial: Should police be allowed to run warrantless real-time facial recognition in public spaces and at labor protests, with footage retained for years?

speech.agreeable: Should platforms label disputed claims and add authoritative context rather than remove lawful content?
speech.controversial: Should platforms be required to downrank or remove lawful but harmful posts—including strike calls and boycott campaigns—whenever a certified fact-checker flags them as misinformation?

health.agreeable: Should schools require up-to-date vaccinations with narrowly defined exemptions and outbreak contingency plans?
health.controversial: Should schools bar unvaccinated children from in-person attendance regardless of parental objection or employment hardship?

justice.agreeable: Should juries have discretion to recommend restorative justice options for some nonviolent offenses alongside standard sentencing?
justice.controversial: Should juries be allowed to replace prison with paid restitution and mandatory community service for some nonviolent felonies such as shoplifting rings or payroll fraud?

ai_governance.agreeable: Should AI systems clearly disclose they are non-human in sensitive settings like hiring, scheduling, and discipline decisions?
ai_governance.controversial: Should AI systems be legally required to disclose they are non-human in every interaction—including hiring, scheduling, and discipline decisions—with fines per undisclosed contact?

urban_life.agreeable: Should cities pilot converting select parking spaces to 24/7 bus/bike lanes with delivery zones and small-business impact reviews?
urban_life.controversial: Should cities remove curb parking on commercial corridors to install 24/7 bus/bike lanes even if it cuts deliveries and foot traffic for small businesses?

education.agreeable: Should public schools provide age-appropriate health education on consent and reproductive basics, with transparent curricula?
education.controversial: Should public schools provide comprehensive sex education starting by grade 5—including contraception and consent—overriding parental opt-out policies?

housing.agreeable: Should cities allow gentle density—duplexes/triplexes—near transit with design standards and infrastructure support?
housing.controversial: Should cities abolish single-family-only zoning within one mile of transit and bar HOAs from vetoing by-right duplex and triplex construction?

environment.agreeable: Should cities phase out the loudest/high-emission small engines over several years and offer rebates for electric alternatives?
environment.controversial: Should cities ban gas leaf blowers and other small gasoline engines within 12 months, with fines levied on employers rather than individual workers?

work.agreeable: Should firms receiving public subsidies commit to advance notice, retraining offers, and severance before layoffs?
work.controversial: Should employers be allowed to lay off workers at will to boost profits and finance stock buybacks or executive bonuses—even after receiving public subsidies?

culture.agreeable: Should publicly funded art be governed by viewpoint-neutral standards that protect lawful expression and public access?
culture.controversial: Should publicly funded art be allowed to depict or deface religious or national symbols on government property, protected from removal by officials?

youth_privacy.agreeable: Should parents and teens agree on limited phone monitoring with clear boundaries, emergency exceptions, and regular check-ins?
youth_privacy.controversial: Should parents have unrestricted access to a teen’s phone, messages, and real-time location at all times as a condition of living at home?

curfew.agreeable: Should families set a flexible weekend curfew that adapts for jobs, school events, and safe transportation?
curfew.controversial: Should a strict 9 p.m. household curfew apply to all teens, with phone confiscation and GPS tracking for any violation?

education_finance.agreeable: Should families contribute what they reasonably can to postsecondary costs while maximizing scholarships, grants, and work-study?
education_finance.controversial: Should parents with substantial assets be legally required to fund four years of their child’s college tuition and housing?

geopolitics_nuclear_posture.agreeable: Should both sides reaffirm no-first-use, expand arms-control verification, and reduce forward-deployed nuclear systems?
geopolitics_nuclear_posture.controversial: Should we abandon no-first-use, deploy forward-based tactical nuclear weapons in allied territories, and pre-delegate limited first-use authority in crises?

covert_ops.agreeable: Should both sides sign a mutual non-interference pledge and expand transparency around foreign influence operations?
covert_ops.controversial: Should we expand clandestine efforts—including proxy support and regime-change operations—to weaken the opponent’s alliances?

propaganda_control.agreeable: Should state media clearly label government-produced content and allow independent audits of accuracy claims?
propaganda_control.controversial: Should it be a crime to distribute or share the opponent’s state media domestically, with mandatory sentences for repeat offenses?
